subject: FWD: let's "celebrate" Trump's birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Hey,

Trump is waiting for birthday wishes tomorrow -- we're sending him something a little different.

**[Sign your name on our card with a donation here to help us remind Trump what he's up against in Florida.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+on+our+card+with+a+donati&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2")**

_Begin forwarded message:_

Team,

Tomorrow is Donald Trump's birthday, and we want to "honor" the occasion.

While Trump and his allies may spend the day celebrating and praising him for a job well done, **Trump needs to know that his actions in office have been disgraceful** , and that this November, we're electing Democrats to check his power.

**[We are sending this letter to Donald Trump to"celebrate" his birthday with a firm reminder that Democrats aren't slowing down in our fight to win this November. _Donate now to add your name to his card so he gets a special "surprise" on his birthday Thursday ->_](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+We+are+sending+this+letter+to+Donald+Tru&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2")** Dear Donald Trump,

No doubt you're going to use your birthday as another opportunity to brag about how "great" you think you are as president.

**I 'm sick of your empty boasts, and I'm sick of your reckless leadership. That is why I'm taking action to "celebrate" your birthday.**

**[I'm donating to Florida Democrats and adding my name to your birthday card today so you can see how many people are working to defeat your agenda this year!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Irsquom+donating+to+Florida+Democrats+an&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2") **
[DONATE AND SIGN THE CARD ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+AND+SIGN+THE+CARD+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2") Since you took office, you've taken our country backwards.

You passed unconstitutional travel bans, denied the threat of climate change, and cozied up to dictators like Kim Jong Un.

**It might be your birthday Thursday, but I am fighting every day to challenge you and stop your agenda this November!**

**[I'm proud to support Democrats in critical states like Florida, which are on the front lines of the fight to flip Congress and the Senate blue this year.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Irsquom+proud+to+support+Democrats+in+cr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2") **
[DONATE AND SIGN THE CARD ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+AND+SIGN+THE+CARD+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2") Sincerely,

[Your Name Here] Let's make sure Trump hears from us loud and clear on his birthday: Florida does NOT support your right-wing agenda. **[Donate today and add your name to Trump's birthday card!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Donate+today+and+add+your+name+to+Trumps&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180613_2_2")**

Thanks,
Florida Democrats

---
| |
---
We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters.

name: Molly Kelly
subject: 17,000 teachers support my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485e/d0ce7de/515ee620/9cd2d33/3633750659/VEsH/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485e/d0ce7de/515ee620/9cd2d33/3633750659/VEsE/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
Dear friends,
Our campaign received a big boost today. The New Hampshire chapter of the National Education Association - which represents 17,000 public school teachers and educators - announced its support for my campaign for governor.
Public school teachers make such a big difference in the lives of our children, expanding minds and opening up a lifetime of learning and opportunity.
**[**Join New Hampshire teachers in supporting my campaign by giving $5 today.**](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485e/d0ce7de/515ee620/9cd2d32/3633750659/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNjMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk63-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
But Governor Chris Sununu wants to erode public education by passing a school voucher bill. The scheme would take money from public schools and give it to private and religious schools. That's just wrong for our students, and wrong for New Hampshire.
Donald Trump sent his education secretary, Betsy DeVos, to New Hampshire just a few weeks ago to raise money for Chris Sununu's reelection campaign. DeVos and Sununu share an extreme right-wing agenda to create a voucher program that would take money from our public schools, take opportunities from our children and leave taxpayers with higher property taxes.
****[Will you help me combat deep-pocketed donors trying to bankroll Chris Sununu's campaign by giving $5 today?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485e/d0ce7de/515ee620/9cd2d32/3633750659/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNjMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk63-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Public education is the core of our democracy. If a school voucher bill that takes money from public schools and gives it to private or religious schools were to ever reach my desk, I would veto it. New Hampshire's teachers know that I will always stand with them to ensure the best for our children.
Thank you,
Molly
[Contribute](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485e/d0ce7de/515ee620/9cd2d32/3633750659/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNjMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk63-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Supporters of Molly Kelly email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485e/d0ce7de/515ee620/9cd2d31/3633750659/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent

name: update@rosenfornevada.com
subject: how we stop McConnell:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is huge: According to _The Washington Post_ , **Mitch McConnell has admitted that the battle for the Senate majority runs straight through Nevada.**
So this new poll showing us neck and neck with the GOP's rubber stamp, Dean Heller, has us very worried.
Team, we fell short of our fundraising goal last month, and **we absolutely cannot afford to fall short again.**
A Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC has already pledged to funnel millions into winning this race and protecting the Republican Senate majority - and right now we're falling way short of where we need to be. **In a race like this, every single dollar is the difference between winning and losing, so we're counting on you to give now to become a Senate Victory Member.**
**[**Please give $5 or more - whatever you can before our critical deadline - and become a Senate Victory Member and help us turn Nevada blue.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd78e/4fbb2af3/700cdbad/5e8a42f5/3148614143/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk754-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump know what's at stake if they lose in Nevada this fall: Nothing less than repealing Obamacare, defunding Planned Parenthood and confirming even more ultraconservative Supreme Court justices.
It all comes down to this race. If we can't hit fundraising goals like this one, we could easily lose our best shot to take back the Senate. **So we need you with us right now - can we count on you to rush $5 or more immediately to stop McConnell and the GOP by flipping Nevada blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats?**
**[**Please team, donate $5 right now and become a Senate Victory Member to help us stop the GOP's extreme agenda, flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats!**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd78e/4fbb2af3/700cdbad/5e8a42f5/3148614143/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk754-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd78e/4fbb2af3/700cdbad/5e8a42f1/3148614143/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd78e/4fbb2af3/700cdbad/5e8a42fe/3148614143/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd78e/4fbb2af3/700cdbad/5e8a42ff/3148614143/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: protect our health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
---
| | [**_TAKE ACTION: Tell Washington to stop playing politics with your health care. >>_**](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c4f/45aebd3c/4be17469/2ca919f3/990495273/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-our-healthcare/?code=sinema&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fhcthanks%3Frefcode%3DHCPet%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+TAKE+ACTION+Tell+Washington+to+stop+play&utm_campaign=KS_EM_PT_WL_180613_3_1&source=KS_EM_PT_WL_180613_3_1&refcode=KS_EM_PT_WL_180613_3_1")

|
---

Friend,

Everyday people deserve leaders who will work together to fix our health care system.

Unfortunately Republican leadership in Washington has been taking us in the wrong direction, actually making coverage MORE expensive for Arizona families.

**Americans deserve better. If you agree, I need you to raise your voice now.**

[**_SIGN ON: Tell Washington to stop playing politics with your health care._**](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c4f/45aebd3c/4be17469/2ca919ec/990495273/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-our-healthcare/?code=sinema&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fhcthanks%3Frefcode%3DHCPet%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+ON+Tell+Washington+to+stop+playing+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_PT_WL_180613_3_1&source=KS_EM_PT_WL_180613_3_1&refcode=KS_EM_PT_WL_180613_3_1")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Here’s My Advice to President Trump on North Korea (for what it’s worth)
body:
Here's My Advice to President Trump on North Korea (for what it's worth) No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Here's My Advice to President Trump on North Korea (for what it's worth)](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-j/)
For the last year and a half or so, President Trump's critics have been warning that he was going to trigger World War III by his overly aggressive tactics towards North Korea. Then, surprising nearly everyone, President Trump and Kim Jong Un agreed to meet this week. So I'm blogging this week on my thoughts about where they go from here. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Could This Actually Be a Pretty Good Election Cycle for Republicans?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-d/)
We've been hearing an awful lot about the coming "blue wave". But while The Left and their friends in the media talk about it, Republicans in Congress along with the President have been getting real things done for the American people. Which leads me to wonder, could this actually be a pretty good year for Republicans? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [About As Different As You Can Get](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-u/)
There's a lot to talk about in a typical race for a congressional seat. Using the First Congressional District of Ohio for example, there are a great many differences between my opponent, Democrat Aftab Pureval, and myself. Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Is There Anything That Can Be Done to Reduce Gas Prices?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-n/)
If you've filled up your gas tank recently, you're aware that prices have been going through the roof. They've gone from about $2.29 a gallon to approximately $3.00 a gallon in what seems like no time. Is there anything that can be done to reverse this trend? Click below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-p/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-m/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-c/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-a/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jyutdhjy-961825B2-kujkulhluu-s) | [Unsubscribe](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jyutdhjy-kujkulhluu-g/)

name: The White House
subject: What a ‘Nation of faith’ looks like
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d781269686d550a78567d9103a4743abb0c1adcd54ebfa584b9147001f8299a92839a4909bde43b990ca459bbbf0adbfa500) The White House • June 14, 2018
## The Day Ahead
Today is President Donald J. Trump's birthday, which coincides with both National Flag Day and the 243rd birthday of the U.S. Army. [Read the President's Flag Day Proclamation.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d78139186cda9b926aea13fa3e69e1ae32889ab32a1145ac53727bafdf97afb91de03e5a0336007491a7d8ca6a25a4cfd9c5) |
---
|

## What a 'Nation of faith' looks like
**The 161st session of the Southern Baptist Convention** assembled this week in Dallas, Texas. The Convention includes more than 47,000 churches ministering to more than 15 million people, and its houses of worship can be found in all 50 states and in communities of every size.
**Vice President Mike Pence addressed the Convention yesterday**. "You know, the President likes to say, in his words, that we're a Nation of faith," the Vice President said. "The truth is, Southern Baptists have always worked to bring about renewal of America, and new beginnings. And as I stand before you today, I believe that our Nation is in the midst of a time of renewal."
**The real source of America's greatness** , he reiterated, is in the work of its people. "The truth is no podium that President Trump and I will ever stand behind will be of greater consequence than the pulpits you stand behind every Sunday morning. No policy we enact will ever be more meaningful than the ministries you lead. And no action we take will ever be more powerful than your prayers."
[Read Vice President Pence's words in full to the Southern Baptist Convention.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d781dfc87909656fa3d4590870d9182e00b33e6eb77bd3926853428a278fc34af21adcd61edf7a60f96d19d2f7caa5eb97b7)
**Go deeper** : [How President Trump has stood up for religious freedom ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d781614443e108fd4ca815f0a69490fe487b4a5d30b5642bb89f13cef8333f399eeb8bb5c763bbdf0bab1530d75a86e1d921)

---
|

## A tremendous moment for the world
**President Trump's successful Singapore summit** marks a new pathway to peace on the Korean Peninsula. "Chairman Kim has the chance to seize an incredible future for his people. Anyone can make war, but only the most courageous can make peace," President Trump said.
**Headlines across the U.S. this week** tell the story of what this new chapter in American diplomacy will look like:
• | Fox News: North Korea Agrees to 'Complete Denuclearization of the Korean Peninsula' after Trump-Kim Summit
---|---
• | _The Daily Caller_ : Kim Jong-Un Promises 'Major Change' At Trump Signing Ceremony
• | _New York Post_ Editorial Board: Singapore Summit is a Good First Step
• | Byron York of the _Washington Examiner_ : On North Korea, a President Who Tried Something Different
[See more news clips about the historic summit with North Korea. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d781cf1b713094b9f391a0cf1bde3e37a131dbf0268e68e8c0f507f223d69cb8f86ea6195cb227b0721e5dea4bc07ebc349f)
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d781cf1b713094b9f391a0cf1bde3e37a131dbf0268e68e8c0f507f223d69cb8f86ea6195cb227b0721e5dea4bc07ebc349f)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump at a press conference in Singapore** | June 12, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d78142deb2598727b542c88f22ecee5bea3c3adbf76d3056926939ee6d16f2ed18138d516f8455dbb6e43c738d88832dad36) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad318027fdd8d781d960fd175a2f9db7ae5d9fb171d029ffaf33284d801123cfb6fa32d8cacadb5a2a0a098dd235c4d289cb6c3084c0433a) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d44753f30601e3bd9f8368e73333471bad8543e41b973aeafad37083415a323607ea08c4994d1ea962d4fa988dc6a9d6a63985957e6ed183b7)
---

name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: Weekly Update - June 14
body:
We’re having a Party!

You are invited to celebrate summer beauty at its best and join us for a Hidden Gardens Tour of seven private Huntsville gardens in the Twickenham and Old Town historic neighborhoods on Saturday, June 23, from 10 am to 2 pm. Tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the tour. This will be an amazing event and a truly unique way to support our campaign. Be sure to encourage all of your friends to attend, as well!

For $75, you can enjoy the tour and a reception afterward with Peter and renowned horticulturist and gardening author Harvey Cotten at the garden of Frank Nola.

But WAIT - there’s more!! For a contribution of $200, Harvey Cotten will visit your garden and provide one and a half hours of expert consultation. This donation also includes admission to the Hidden Gardens Tour and the Evening Garden Party/Reception. Visit the [campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402205/7641008/643447681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=) to get your tickets now!

Show the district a sign!

Peter Joffrion for Congress signs are in! You can pick up your yard sign at campaign headquarters in Huntsville at 303 Williams Ave. Suite 211. Signs are also being distributed to county Democratic Party offices. Call to see if they have them at your county office. Yard signs make a huge difference in a campaign's visibility and sense of energy. We want to see those signs popping up all over the district!

Democratic Women’s Luncheon

The recent Madison County Democratic Women's luncheon had a full house, and Peter was the featured speaker! He gave an inspiring talk about how the Women's March encouraged him to run and how he intends to be a strong advocate for women and girls in Congress. Other attendees included Don Siegelman, Don’s son Joe, Terry Jones, and Jessica Fortune Barker. You can watch Peter’s speech here. [https://bit.ly/2LMJUpH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402206/7641009/-1414403919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=)

Volunteer of the Week

Dee Williams gets kudos this week for being an ever-present force. No task is too difficult for Dee to tackle. She gets things done every day with efficiency and grace. Thank you, Dee!

Peter in the Media

Peter has been making news and sharing his message! This last week was especially busy, with Peter appearing on a variety of media platforms. Listen to Peter's podcast interview with [Two Broads Talking Politics](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402207/7641010/1525686955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=) or read his op-ed on [Dem Write Press](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402208/7641011/1704703972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=). You can even watch Peter on [Rocket City Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402209/7641012/-302211029?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=) or on [WAFF](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402210/7641013/-739382767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=).

We need you!

As we head into the thick of this election season, we want to keep building momentum. We’re now at the end of a crucial fundraising period, and we need your help! If you haven’t yet contributed, [please give what you can today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1402211/7641014/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMzFlZS1kOTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBggqAgJ7jc3OVflsVX7wqBdmVxaQe4XCgtRoVDH9gA=&emci=7d39733d-806f-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&emdi=277231ee-d96f-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&ceid=6984379&am=25&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=UXc6yoVRtekWMYS062v46VWNeuSJdPJqKz6QCk3Z9H4%3D). Every dollar counts!

Together we can flip the 5th in November!

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804

clean_body: We’re having a Party! You are invited to celebrate summer beauty at its best and join us for a Hidden Gardens Tour of seven private Huntsville gardens in the Twickenham and Old Town historic neighborhoods on Saturday, June 23, from 10 am to 2 pm. Tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the tour. This will be an amazing event and a truly unique way to support our campaign. Be sure to encourage all of your friends to attend, as well! For $75, you can enjoy the tour and a reception afterward with Peter and renowned horticulturist and gardening author Harvey Cotten at the garden of Frank Nola. But WAIT - there’s more!! For a contribution of $200, Harvey Cotten will visit your garden and provide one and a half hours of expert consultation. This donation also includes admission to the Hidden Gardens Tour and the Evening Garden Party/Reception. Visit the = to get your tickets now! Show the district a sign! Peter Joffrion for Congress signs are in! You can pick up your yard sign at campaign headquarters in Huntsville at 303 Williams Ave. Suite 211. Signs are also being distributed to county Democratic Party offices. Call to see if they have them at your county office. Yard signs make a huge difference in a campaign's visibility and sense of energy. We want to see those signs popping up all over the district! Democratic Women’s Luncheon The recent Madison County Democratic Women's luncheon had a full house, and Peter was the featured speaker! He gave an inspiring talk about how the Women's March encouraged him to run and how he intends to be a strong advocate for women and girls in Congress. Other attendees included Don Siegelman, Don’s son Joe, Terry Jones, and Jessica Fortune Barker. You can watch Peter’s speech here. = Volunteer of the Week Dee Williams gets kudos this week for being an ever-present force. No task is too difficult for Dee to tackle. She gets things done every day with efficiency and grace. Thank you, Dee! Peter in the Media Peter has been making news and sharing his message! This last week was especially busy, with Peter appearing on a variety of media platforms. Listen to Peter's podcast interview with = or read his op-ed on =. You can even watch Peter on = or on =. We need you! As we head into the thick of this election season, we want to keep building momentum. We’re now at the end of a crucial fundraising period, and we need your help! If you haven’t yet contributed, . Every dollar counts! Together we can flip the 5th in November! Peter Joffrion for Congress P.O. Dear Peter, The Trump Administration says it will not defend the Affordable Care Act in court. Its lawyers say the ACA is "unconstitutional" -- even though the Supreme Court said the exact opposite six years ago. **Your heard that right: the government says its own law is illegal, even though the highest court says it is legal.** This is absurd. And lives are at risk. The Republicans want to remove protections for pre-existing conditions. **[Healthcare for 133 million Americans is](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1403081/7644768/484812134?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2FkYTNjNS1kZTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCNGLaUYWCVxOSE7pj3vaArDOAXJ2uG45iNlEXt1Mp0=)**[** in jeopardy**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1403082/7644769/484812134?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2FkYTNjNS1kZTZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCNGLaUYWCVxOSE7pj3vaArDOAXJ2uG45iNlEXt1Mp0=). Tens of thousands of individuals in my district alone face a future without care. Why would our government want to make healthcare available for less people? The simplest answer: corruption. Self-interest. Seeking power and wealth, even if it means destroying the rule of law. The stakes could not be higher in this election. The Republicans are willing to destroy the laws and institutions of this country to advance their own interests. These are our laws. Our institutions. Our programs that benefit our people. We will need to keep fighting, just to preserve what we have. I am glad to have you alongside me. With respect, Mike Siegel

body:
#
Hey Peter, did you see Governor Bredesen’s email from yesterday?
Governor Bredesen is right -- your help during these deadlines is important. Your donations give us the support we need to travel the state talking to Tennessee families about the things that matter to them, open field offices like we just did in Memphis, and get our message in front of voters on TV, radio, and online.
Having the support to keep doing this important work is why we’re able to tune out the partisan noise and keep this campaign about Tennessee -- whether i’s combating the opioid epidemic, speaking up against job-killing tariffs, or championing hyper-local issues like the invasive Asian carp. Can you chip in to help?
**[https://secure.bredesen.us/mid-june-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1403141/7644995/468927790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjNkMDQ3Yy1kZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRDT4yBRkEuwfj4VlUBege5tKjk3dWC1Q5xWsEhzqrM=&refcode=em180614-MM2-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**

\-- Bob

* * *

Peter --
In the next few days, you’re going to be hearing from my team again about a critical fundraising deadline coming up on Friday. I wanted a moment of your time to explain why your support during these deadlines is so important.
Last week, our campaign opened our first grassroots office in Memphis. Tennesseans from all walks of life came to be a part of our first Memphis door-to-door canvas. **And they were ready to get to work.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1403144/7644998/468927790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjNkMDQ3Yy1kZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRDT4yBRkEuwfj4VlUBege5tKjk3dWC1Q5xWsEhzqrM=&refcode=em180614-MM2-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
As our team knocked on doors in Memphis, here’s what our volunteers heard loud and clear from Tennesseans: they want their next Senator to focus on bringing people together to get things done for Tennessee.
**I’m applying for the job because I have a proven track record of doing just that.**
As governor of Tennessee, I worked with Republicans and Democrats to balance eight budgets without gimmicks and recruit companies that continue bringing thousands of good jobs and investment into our state.
We tuned out the partisan rancor that dominates Washington politics and focused on getting things done for Tennesseans. I’m running to be your next United States Senator because I think it’s time for Congress to do the same. **So I’m asking:**
[**Can you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to support the campaign ahead of this week’s deadline? Your donations are making a big difference, and I appreciate your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1403146/7645000/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjNkMDQ3Yy1kZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRDT4yBRkEuwfj4VlUBege5tKjk3dWC1Q5xWsEhzqrM=&refcode=em180614-MM2-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)

—Phil Bredesen

name: U.S. Senator Jon Tester
subject: I need your help, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
I've been defending Montana in the Senate, and Mitch McConnell would like nothing more than to flip this seat.
---
Derek --

There are five Democratic senators up for re-election in "deep red" states and I'm one of them.

I've been defending Montana in the Senate, and I've fought to protect our public lands, hold Washington accountable, and ensure that more veterans get the care they've earned. But Mitch McConnell has singled out Montana as one of the GOP's top targets this year. If we want to ensure that we have some balance in Washington, we need to hold on to my seat.

**Unfortunately, it takes resources to win elections these days, so I'm asking you: Will you make a $10 contribution to my campaign and to Democrats nationwide to send me back to the Senate and elect Democrats up and down the ballot?**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb49d/4147416202/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb49a/4147416202/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb49b/4147416202/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb498/4147416202/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb499/4147416202/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/reelect-jon-tester?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a6/4147416202/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")
** I come from a family of farmers, and I got my start in public service as a local school board member in Big Sandy. I've seen firsthand how change is possible when people come together in their communities around a common purpose rooted in our shared values.

It's those values that we must fight for.

What we've seen over the past year is a kick in the teeth to our democracy. Washington Republicans have waged countless attacks on our health care while giving tax breaks to the wealthiest people and corporations. We can put working folks first -- but only if Democrats take back the Senate in November.

**[Make a $10 donation to my campaign and Democrats nationwide today to help keep this Senate seat blue and elect Democrats across the country.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a7/4147416202/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-++if+consinConsGroup30561+You+stood+with+&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")**

I am counting on you to help me win re-election and continue defending our values in the Senate. Thank you for adding a contribution today to help make that possible.

Jon Tester
U.S. Senator, Montana

P.S. Democrats can regain a majority in the Senate this fall -- but only if we defend my seat in Montana. **[Donate $10 to my campaign and Democrats nationwide today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a4/4147416202/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-jon-tester?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Youve+already+d&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a5/4147416202/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a2/4147416202/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a3/4147416202/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a0/4147416202/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c89/4067b0a/64257affa/7fbbb4a1/4147416202/VEsHBg/ "http://www.Democrats.org?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+wwwDemocratsorg&utm_campaign=em_20180614_jt_nd&source=em_20180614_jt_nd&refcode=em_20180614_jt_nd"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jason Yates
subject: After the historic summit...the future of North Korea
body:
Peter,
Tuesday's summit between the U.S. and North Korea was truly historic, but as with most agreements like these, time will tell what the details and outcomes will truly be.
We want the opinions of people of faith.
[Take our short survey and let us know what you think of the summit's impact](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fsurvey%2Fus-north-korea-summit%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180614srv01&n=1).
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fsurvey%2Fus-north-korea-summit%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180614srv01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180614srv01&n=3)

subject: Do you want more Rand Pauls in the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, this is probably one of the biggest reasons I love working on Austin’s campaign for U.S. Senate. We need more Rand Paul’s in the Senate fighting for our liberties. But how do we do it? Well, luckily Austin is running for Senate in Missouri and represents our best chance to elect a liberty candidate in 2018. Let’s be honest... Rand Paul is never going to balance the budget, audit the Fed, and cut spending by himself. He needs fellow hardcore conservatives in the Senate to vote for his bills and work with him. Which is why we need to elect Austin. But before he can join Rand in the Senate, we’ve gotta win this primary in August. Friend, do you want more Rand Paul’s in the Senate? Please make a donation to the campaign so we can make this possible. | _Hoosiers Coming Together for the National Day of Action_

| Friends -

This Saturday, June 16, Republicans across the country will be participating in the National Day of Action. And nowhere is the National Day of Action more important than Indiana!

**That’s because control of the United States Senate is in play, and Indiana is positioned to be the firewall protecting our Republican majority! By defeating Democrat Joe Donnelly this November and sending in conservative outsider Mike Braun, Indiana will prevent obstructionist Democrats from repealing President Trump’s tax cut and standing in the way of real progress in Washington. **

Grassroots Republicans like you will be trained this weekend on the latest advancements in voter contact and political leadership. And in the process, you’ll gain the skills needed to impact our elections...and to remind voters that we need them to stand by President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence to protect and expand our Republican majorities in Washington.
**
Will you join your fellow Republicans from across Indiana and the nation this weekend by participating in the National Day of Action?** _Stand by President Trump and Vice President Pence today, and participate in a National Day of Action event near you this Saturday:_

name: Mel Hall
subject: Add your name: improve health care for veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

My great-grandmother sent 11 grandsons to World War II. Thankfully, all 11 came back. For me, protecting our veterans is a sacred obligation.

Too often, when our veterans come home, Members of Congress keep their hands in their pockets and their mouths shut.

Our veterans don't receive adequate mental health care or they wait too long to receive treatment. They don't receive enough support for continuing their education or finding meaningful civilian employment either.

[**Add your name: tell Congress it 's time to provide our veterans with the support they deserve when they return home.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9e3ytXlkBfIz_Tu9LSA9JLpO0Mz5P8-LhD3B8rI0IY=/UwT_yQgW4onND4X_uowndPrwkhUGEUadfcH2siO5rX0=)

Our veterans swear an oath and commit to serving our country -- and in return, we make sure they have all the training and resources they need to be successful while they serve.

But far too often, when our heroes come back from battle, they are met with dry mouths, closed pocket books, wait times, and red tape. We can do better.

Our veterans deserve a VA that is more efficient and accountable, along with our full support as they transition back to civilian life.

[**I 'm committed to fighting for the care our veterans have earned. Add your name to say you're with me: our veterans deserve more.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9e3ytXlkBfIz_Tu9LSA9JLpO0Mz5P8-LhD3B8rI0IY=/UwT_yQgW4onND4X_uowndPrwkhUGEUadfcH2siO5rX0=)

Thank you,

Mel Hall

| Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---

Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/w9e3ytXlkBfIz_Tu9LSA9JLpO0Mz5P8-LhD3B8rI0IY=/4fbI57-egxsoNk0AGWHYpZFcRAfIf4e8PctGhJ3dl0I=).

name: Tina Smith
subject: A red wave in Minnesota?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our plan to win this race doesn't work without you. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b2e5/c1f7015/6810fdfd/1142abc7/342835568/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180614_em-nd-A") Friends- **If you 've been waiting to make your first contribution -- I'm here to tell you the time to give is right now.** Here's why:
* Republican leaders like Newt Gingrich are telling every billionaire donor they can that Minnesota is "vulnerable" and that a red wave is coming.
* Republicans just endorsed a far-right conservative to run against me, someone who proudly says they want to "build the wall."
* The biggest deadline of this campaign is in just 16 days -- and everyone will be watching to see if we fall short of our goal.

[**Please make your first contribution of $3 or whatever you are able to help us reach our $50,000 end-of-quarter grassroots goal. Every dollar makes a difference and every contribution sends a message about the power of this team.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b2e5/c1f7015/6810fdfd/1142abc7/342835568/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180614_em-nd-A") You may think "It's $3, what can you do with that?" I get it. But what we're trying to build is a team of hundreds and thousands of people who give what they can when they are able. Each of these contributions adds up to a campaign that can defeat anyone. This type of grassroots fundraising is the only way I want to run this campaign, but it simply doesn't work without you. [**Please chip in $3 or whatever you are able towards our end-of-quarter goal and let 's send a message to every Republican watching that Minnesota will stay blue in November.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b2e5/c1f7015/6810fdfd/1142abc7/342835568/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180614_em-nd-A") If we miss this goal, Republicans everywhere will think we're vulnerable and spend even more money to defeat us. We can't let that happen. Counting on you, Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b2e5/c1f7015/6810fdfd/1142abc7/342835568/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180614_em-nd-A")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Things You Need to Know Vol. 4
body:
Democratic Leadership Playing Politics | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/things-you-need-to-know-vol-4?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW Vol. 4** **Democratic Leadership Just Playing Politics**
**_Governor Scott knows we can hold the line on taxes, fully fund school budgets and make a payment to teachers' retirement liability _**
A small number of extremist Democrat and Progressive party leaders, and their political allies, are trying to scare Vermonters about a government shutdown.
**Don’t believe them. There’s no reason for the government to shut down and there is a very easy, common sense solution to the “standoff” legislative leaders have manufactured.**
As the Governor has said we have enough surplus revenue ($55.5 million) to fully fund school budgets, keep statewide property tax rates level AND make additional payments to the teachers' retirement system -- something the Democrats have been pushing for. **This could be a win for school budgets, a win for taxpayers and a win for the teachers’ retirement system.
So, what’s the problem? Why won’t they agree to this compromise? **
The problem is the legislative leadership is not listening to working Vermonters, or just doesn't care, as they’re still threatening you with a government shutdown in order to raise your taxes.
**Think about that...** There’s $55.5 million in surplus, which would easily prevent property tax rates from rising and allow the State to make an extra payment into the teachers’ retirement fund -- but they keep sending the Governor proposals that raise statewide property tax rates.
They either really believe that raising taxes year after year is good for you and for Vermont, or they are putting politics over progress and peace of mind.
**Probably both.** Otherwise, they would agree we can do it all. And this special session would be over and government would be fully funded.
So who is really threatening to shut down government? They are. And they are doing it because they are so deeply committed to raising your property tax rates and/or trying to make the Governor look bad.
**Remember when they admitted this was part of their strategy?**
Sen. Michael Sirotkin (D-Chittenden) exclaimed, “Take the bill[s] to the goal line and let’s get a bunch of vetoes.” He then went on to say, “The press will get all over the veto...”(1)
Sen. Ann Cummings (D-Washington) agreed by saying, “If he vetoes everything, he’s gonna have some 'splaining to do”. (1)

Now this strategy was manufactured in early February of this year, you may be thinking it sounds eerily familiar... well that’s because they followed through, sent as many bad bills as they could to the Governor, and they’re continuing to play the political game of chicken with our budget and tax bill.

**IF YOU AGREE WITH THE GOVERNOR, PLEASE FORWARD THIS TO 5 FRIENDS AND _EMAIL SEN. TIME ASHE (tashe@leg.state.vt.us) AND SPEAKER MITZI JOHNSON (mjohnson@leg.state.vt.us)_ AND URGE THEM TO STOP PLAYING POLITICS AND WORK WITH THE GOVERNOR ON A BUDGET AND TAX BILL WITH NO TAX RATE INCREASES.** **And don't forget to sign our petition!**
---

far too few voters know what my opponent believes in and stands
for.

It's up to US to spread the word and ensure that every

name: Anthony Pardal
subject: RE: Unacceptable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1nHwrN5rEIcqxE7T581VgmNoi8eZ09ms1wui0iwx7HM=/X9pZvZKnTIoN5lMmr5jRyxM11hiYIxMx5WCNoj4ZW5M=) Friends and Neighbors -- Just wanted to make sure you saw Jeremy's e-mail from the other day-- **[and the article _the Miami Herald_ has just published. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/1nHwrN5rEIcqxE7T581VgmNoi8eZ09ms1wui0iwx7HM=/I2Wk8gqBm6l2MWbYpPXOlnZUd4h1ddyzkS6tmG2XdOE=)** Purging employees and replacing them with cronies, encouraging behavior to intentionally avoid paper trails, and making agency officials less available to the public. Oh, and gag orders, I forgot to mention gag orders. This is Rick Scott's Department of Revenue -- the agency that collects _YOUR_ taxes. **This behavior is unacceptable and the very reason why Floridians have lost faith in their government. But it gets worse...**. When CFO Patronis had the opportunity to publicly question the Director about these practices, he sat there quietly. This isn't surprising though, since CFO Patronis has never publicly contradicted Governor Scott. I wonder why this is, could it be because Governor Scott handpicked him for his job? Nah, couldn't be that ... could it? **The CFO is supposed to be a check on the Governor, not a rubber stamp.** That is one of the many reasons why I am proud to be working for a candidate like Jeremy Ring. Jeremy would bring a fresh, innovative and bold new approach to Tallahassee, bringing much needed transparency and accountability to our state government. But he's got to get elected first. **And he can 't do it without all of our help**. **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help bring new leadership, accountability and transparency to the cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/1nHwrN5rEIcqxE7T581VgmNoi8eZ09ms1wui0iwx7HM=/2cCme-rnrjFSmuwS47EQojbZ3Lqxi1UdA6MevJy8IS8=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all you do**,** **Anthony** \- Anthony Pardal, Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for CFO \---------- Forwarded message ---------- Florida's government is unique in that the Governor and the Cabinet have a power-sharing relationship. They share oversight and hiring authority of the directors of several agencies-- including the departments of revenue, law enforcement, highway safety, the division of bond finance and the state board of administration. But you wouldn't know that if you were to attend one of the increasingly scant Cabinet meetings. That's because under Governor Scott's "leadership" Cabinet meetings are scarce and when they are held, substantive discussion has virtually disappeared. With all that's going on in Florida, Governor Scott has found it appropriate to only schedule eight meetings for this year -- while previous Cabinets met nearly every other week on average. What's been on the agenda of the three meetings that have actually taken place? Unfortunately, not much -- mostly award ceremonies and Attorney General Bondi's promotion of offering dogs for adoption. **This is unacceptable. ** [Get the Cabinet Back to Work. Contribute $20.18](https://act.myngp.com/el/1nHwrN5rEIcqxE7T581VgmNoi8eZ09ms1wui0iwx7HM=/2cCme-rnrjFSmuwS47EQojbZ3Lqxi1UdA6MevJy8IS8=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Governor Scott was the CEO of a publicly traded company and I guarantee you that he would not have conducted board meetings like this. If he had, he would have been fired. The Cabinet is no different. **This also begs the question, where was CFO Patronis? And, why didn 't he step up when the Governor couldn't be bothered to do his job? The CFO and Cabinet should be a check to the Governor's Office not a rubber stamp. ** The Governor can't finish a sentence without saying "let's get to work". It's long past time that he, CFO Patronis and the rest of the Cabinet actually tried that for a change. As CFO I will demand that the Cabinet get back to work with at least monthly meetings that focus on the business of the State, not awards ceremonies or pet adoption seminars. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more today to help me get the Cabinet back to work -- and working for you?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1nHwrN5rEIcqxE7T581VgmNoi8eZ09ms1wui0iwx7HM=/2cCme-rnrjFSmuwS47EQojbZ3Lqxi1UdA6MevJy8IS8=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

clean_body: | = Friends and Neighbors -- Just wanted to make sure you saw Jeremy's e-mail from the other day-- = Purging employees and replacing them with cronies, encouraging behavior to intentionally avoid paper trails, and making agency officials less available to the public. Oh, and gag orders, I forgot to mention gag orders. This is Rick Scott's Department of Revenue -- the agency that collects YOUR taxes. This behavior is unacceptable and the very reason why Floridians have lost faith in their government. But it gets worse.... When CFO Patronis had the opportunity to publicly question the Director about these practices, he sat there quietly. This isn't surprising though, since CFO Patronis has never publicly contradicted Governor Scott. I wonder why this is, could it be because Governor Scott handpicked him for his job? Nah, couldn't be that ... could it? The CFO is supposed to be a check on the Governor, not a rubber stamp. That is one of the many reasons why I am proud to be working for a candidate like Jeremy Ring. Jeremy would bring a fresh, innovative and bold new approach to Tallahassee, bringing much needed transparency and accountability to our state government. But he's got to get elected first. And he can 't do it without all of our help. & Thank you for all you do, Anthony \- Anthony Pardal, Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for CFO \---------- Forwarded message ---------- Florida's government is unique in that the Governor and the Cabinet have a power-sharing relationship. They share oversight and hiring authority of the directors of several agencies-- including the departments of revenue, law enforcement, highway safety, the division of bond finance and the state board of administration. But you wouldn't know that if you were to attend one of the increasingly scant Cabinet meetings. That's because under Governor Scott's "leadership" Cabinet meetings are scarce and when they are held, substantive discussion has virtually disappeared. With all that's going on in Florida, Governor Scott has found it appropriate to only schedule eight meetings for this year -- while previous Cabinets met nearly every other week on average. What's been on the agenda of the three meetings that have actually taken place? Unfortunately, not much -- mostly award ceremonies and Attorney General Bondi's promotion of offering dogs for adoption. This is unacceptable. & Governor Scott was the CEO of a publicly traded company and I guarantee you that he would not have conducted board meetings like this. If he had, he would have been fired. The Cabinet is no different. This also begs the question, where was CFO Patronis? And, why didn 't he step up when the Governor couldn't be bothered to do his job? The CFO and Cabinet should be a check to the Governor's Office not a rubber stamp. The Governor can't finish a sentence without saying "let's get to work". It's long past time that he, CFO Patronis and the rest of the Cabinet actually tried that for a change. As CFO I will demand that the Cabinet get back to work with at least monthly meetings that focus on the business of the State, not awards ceremonies or pet adoption seminars. But I have an election to win first. And I can 't do it without your help. & Thank you for everything you do, Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

| | Hi , I am happy to announce that [Stacey Abrams has endorsed my campaign for Prince George's County Executive.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3e/767134fb/5f5e5ad0/43383295/2420374559/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oSA0bhgC324&feature=youtu.be") I am thrilled to know that we have the support of my friend Stacey, a trailblazer who is poised to lead the state of Georgia. She believes in my vision for this county and our nation. Stacey knows that I am the best person to lead Prince George's County because of my commitment to fighting for the most vulnerable members of our community. To win this election, I rely on grassroots support instead of big real estate developers funding my opponent. **[Will you show your support by donating $10 or whatever you can today?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3e/767134fb/5f5e5ad0/43383292/2420374559/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Now more than ever, we need leaders who will stand up against Trump's dangerous policy agenda and fight to improve access to health care, build community schools, and spur innovation in our economy. Both Stacey and I share this commitment, and if you are in solidarity with us, **[I hope you will support my campaign for Prince George's County Executive by donating $10 or whatever you can today.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3e/767134fb/5f5e5ad0/43383292/2420374559/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Thank you for continued support. Together, we can build a better future for every state and county. Donna Edwards

"Worried" doesn't even begin to describe how we're feeling right now:
* Our polling lead is officially GONE: a new poll shows us neck and neck with Donald Trump yes-man Dean Heller.

* **According to Nate Silver's **_FiveThirtyEight_ , losing "could condemn Democrats to the Senate minority indefinitely."

* We missed our critical fundraising goal last month.

The math and the map are clear: Democrats can ONLY regain our Senate majority if we win in Nevada - and right now, we're dropping the ball. We're not raising enough, and we could easily lose this race.

**That's why we've set a goal of adding 2,500 Senate Victory Members before midnight tonight. But with just hours to go, we're still falling 376 members short. **

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Let's get it done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137a0/3535029203/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")
---

Peter,

We are less than five months out from Election Day.

Looking back, we've come such a long way since November 2016. And I couldn't be prouder of the work we've done together.

So if you heard Hillary Clinton tell us to never stop believing that fighting for what's right is worth it -- **[make a $3 donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137a1/3535029203/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180614_email_MultiAskV2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+make+a+3+donation+today&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")**

If you marched in one of the Women's Marches with women (and men) around the world to show that we would not let hate, fear, sexism, homophobia, xenophobia, and racism divide us -- **[make a $3 donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137a2/3535029203/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180614_email_MultiAskV2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+make+a+3+donation+today&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")**

If you called your members of Congress and demanded they protect Obamacare because of the millions of lives it has saved -- **[make a $3 donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137a3/3535029203/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180614_email_MultiAskV2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+make+a+3+donation+today&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")**

If you've already sent support to pro-choice Democratic women to help win their primary elections -- thank you, and **[please make ANOTHER donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137dc/3535029203/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180614_email_MultiAskV2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+please+make+ANOTHER+donation+today&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")**

If you believe those women are the future of politics in this country -- **[make a $3 donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137dd/3535029203/VEsA/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180614_email_MultiAskV2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+make+a+3+donation+today&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")**

And if you want November 6th, 2018 to be a complete transformation from November 8th, 2016 -- **[make a $3 donation today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4769/24c69fd9/1a3d6ea30/188137de/3535029203/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180614_email_MultiAskV2?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+make+a+3+donation+today&utm_campaign=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact&source=WQEFER18N_digital_email_20180614_MultiAskV2_inact")**

The last year and a half has been hard, and it hurt a lot of people.

But over the next few months, we have the chance to make things right -- to stop all of the backward steps Donald Trump and his fellow Republicans have taken and move this country forward again.

Let's flip the House. And the Senate. And a bunch of governors' seats and state legislative chambers, too, which have been overrun by extreme Republicans for far too long.

Ready to change the political landscape with you,

Stephanie Schriock

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, We are less than five months out from Election Day. Looking back, we've come such a long way since November 2016. And I couldn't be prouder of the work we've done together. So if you heard Hillary Clinton tell us to never stop believing that fighting for what's right is worth it -- "" If you marched in one of the Women's Marches with women (and men) around the world to show that we would not let hate, fear, sexism, homophobia, xenophobia, and racism divide us -- "" If you called your members of Congress and demanded they protect Obamacare because of the millions of lives it has saved -- "" If you've already sent support to pro-choice Democratic women to help win their primary elections -- thank you, and "" If you believe those women are the future of politics in this country -- "" And if you want November 6th, 2018 to be a complete transformation from November 8th, 2016 -- "" The last year and a half has been hard, and it hurt a lot of people. But over the next few months, we have the chance to make things right -- to stop all of the backward steps Donald Trump and his fellow Republicans have taken and move this country forward again. Let's flip the House. And the Senate. And a bunch of governors' seats and state legislative chambers, too, which have been overrun by extreme Republicans for far too long. Ready to change the political landscape with you, Stephanie Schriock President, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. name: Team Casey
subject: send Betsy DeVos a message >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66ea/51dbcc2a/6ec3a10/3a55092/2088079248/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team --

Last week, Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos revealed that her School Safety Commission, established in the aftermath of yet another school shooting, won't study the role of guns. It's shocking.

We cannot keep ignoring the scourge of gun violence that's threatening our kids. No child should feel unsafe at school, and the Trump administration refuses to take even the most basic steps to protect them.

**Ignoring the problem is not the answer: we need concrete, commonsense solutions to keep our schools safe. Will you sign our petition and demand that Betsy DeVos investigate the role of guns in her study on school safety?

[secure.bobcasey.com/devos](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66ea/51dbcc2a/6ec3a10/3a55093/2088079248/VEsE/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-casey")**

Thanks,

Team Casey

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Pay ransom??? (offshore drilling)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
North Carolina should not have to pay a ransom to protect our beaches from the dangers of offshore drilling. Add your name here if you agree.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12035da/2fde7c66/46a222f4/15683356/1980975721/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=14_43_1255&source=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Hello,

Republicans in Washington D.C. are trying to hold our coast hostage.

We've said it time and time again: **Not Off Our Coast!** Now, there's a bill that would force North Carolina to pay an estimated half a billion dollars to the federal government to be exempted from offshore drilling.

[**North Carolina should not have to pay a ransom to protect our beaches from the dangers of offshore drilling. Add your name here if you agree.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12035da/2fde7c66/46a222f4/15683369/1980975721/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=14_43_1255&source=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+North+Carolina+should+not+have+to+pay+a+")

Our coast is part of our identity, friends. We have over 300 miles of coastline and 22 barrier islands.

Allowing offshore drilling and gas exploration would bring unacceptable risks to our economy, our environment, and our coastal communities--and for little potential gain.

Today, I teamed up with a group of governors to send a letter to congressional leaders that calls this legislation what is: extortion.

Our coast is just too important to our state -- and we shouldn't have to pay a ransom to protect it.

[**Add your name if you agree.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12035da/2fde7c66/46a222f4/15683368/1980975721/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=14_43_1255&source=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree")

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12035da/2fde7c66/46a222f4/1568336b/1980975721/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-not-off-our-coast?gpsid=14_43_1255&source=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_campaign=em18_180614_offsho_adv_gq_act__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr")

Here at Team Maggie HQ, we're focused on keeping Maggie Hassan and other Democrats in the Senate. With the Trump administration in power, hitting every single fundraising goal is more important than ever.
Pundits use our fundraising numbers to gauge our strength, and corporate special interests will identify vulnerable Democrats and spend millions attacking them.
June is an FEC deadline month, so we need as many contributions as possible before we publicly report our numbers. **We 're pacing behind and need 13 donations from 03264 by tomorrow to get back on track. We have to ask:**

Friend,

Friend,

It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday in just a few days and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it!

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIASkzQr1oTWDRVPlxWJBT4mZuhbvIky2dCoRhxUxPXIuwmdL6mZFww7cQYgNJG3gtVrDGaMOpm6z43kaCWZU1XiLgubFwUjTg1arNmIilq_XWV_vtTaSMrE36fiJp1HBxHnKiVKUiYjBMKyXXsV9zJdg9lA_ZF9nSwpJAwe5gux3XUVesIQLifrrPjkND1eJeQ8G5Z-toub_0zVXGMEgUKv51Q5ClCecMJQPvHSkg82HLENa_pMRMpbRWlC7Kmu48Dh3ABzX1gpunSwUr3fDfJLgw_KHDd0LyEgk_OsqUkzw3SmamEBNu3e9vyYNpTdG34S0x6-a-fGLmj4o4jq5IK_jBPm-O0cdP7pxhvvmn50PQHotaN3Pa4gOd8qBIxIj3zSXGHvmHZneuneFjQGz2V0kbBcKOuCtTYcFO4ii8rAQC)

[SIGN THE CARD](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIASkzQr1oTWDRVPlxWJBT4mZuhbvIky2dCoRhxUxPXIuwmdL6mZFww7cQYgNJG3gtVrDGaMOpm6z43kaCWZU1XiLgubFwUjTg1arNmIilq_XWV_vtTaSMrE36fiJp1HBxHnKiVKUiYjBMKyXXsV9zJdg9lA_ZF9nSwpJAwe5gux3XUVesIQLifrrPjkND1eJeQxtzrGlCqMn7QgqU68H-wldG_KAcJp30_A3GitTr8i2z5Cvf7lfpQoG6nqGn2f9aAuc_hMxAV8je6-lWxbmKt2niJiCmJM8u7nnSRon1sR5l-N42Bapcvm5AZNzs0CH-aOuHImebqzfiOKg8HNSjLu71VIgPzqj6ySnqbm8B7dCJ3VwKcHtCNfTU5YcAHzTIqBpdzzzw4eP21so5WDJIEnEFtU3mISmcNiMJ2AvyT6Rt)
