This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=N4kZCa8frpOmdOpdVrMNQGi0pFbfMAZi8ZNl_uin7IWKG8w_kdkOyUNC0T7fZyn6PhUuaWzO7CrISAReF3EBf57mckUxVeBgEA0yz0tZ2fs96W8Vcujrq6LCHFnxinhqYMMaHJBJ_NhlpBRxjVReFaUrHTIoj73Obx1TlRxaHnX9B2CedN81jyTUzptvfcbZQeuaowpsIoflyWN2s8sSHqc_dw-V6Mw40qrZg9hprmwDr1bTFTP9yGzff7_YWc2E). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIAbGH4XF_AH3sjOvZcZlFHFFIaw0bExUFgnHGwxpUt3SzjH1ryC-GK09ToSy40bDpS_EIBVDR3OfcH_I6mfxaZCikcIB3I3Z6Ftm4SOi7pHtEJWc30VwzlDir4C51rjKEIMTAa-jnHHGyGOielY1Fo2voBby2-se3BthZKHJHn9tqNf0vl6y9pR2FsL8r82I7axLUGWrthsSBQmssnUVInAZoSHvmFgi3YT_JvqpsMr0q7_7WVeNOUUu-l6THxTj3ZFxipDPco9iMokVLf33PG0WVRNROLJgG_9e8P2Gkf5IWTNPfy-tv9AikJCf6jqDVZFk6u8-LurpgSJ6u-GnxBQK0FBdYUhYqetFoZWst3b_r) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIAbGH4XF_AH3sjOvZcZlFHFEn0JgO5Txw5mbOuIRMeRUd0mVV49gxEKlBvoRfPwJrx3QRVvxrN8xCgTrkM2kpHP6_X73zgX1pOxCD2r4kU3ejKcHKrjAMXHTjbhTu7R49PJtPzxxLenV2YxURLOJru8ywkYN4xd2TeeMfaQWDT1YnUbxJYIEBJEayzZbdaLRnBqff2IYwMtWe6bKelqQvTXEL-MJbg0hxGcLc9lYckYlS3kb0Lyf9NncppmYwteynpV4zFfSsuXS7DHgbipp25uMvztwwmrEO5RjCn3XtKPY7MOM0dK-7DPVpQUFR1pR4BBLaI_EuoiL5rEy3kmBUIJjA_BaAvaaRdLLHtaJsU-Bo) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIAUw83XumI6FzbclFlSgPssF0eFuL6wwy4fvRPWijQ5fgqHBGtlgD_YZcgaYymyoXIDwtVIb17SD0YcTP6PP9FFPhLRA8cOFauNy7tPT6aS2VWyq1Io7kf5sfzQJdTtaBlZ0umf3Wmty7xF7ni7J049K4kAv2wNnMF5PqwYZ0NfT1ixyZQmqM9q1h8qLE9mETLeYtxEoGOyFlDP__bQqgaRNkNFvlovZdko1WRks_CEdqNCTrWPMlh-pdEZ4PM0fSUw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIAYx2gRsXSgYKptu4y2LWlFFFkKBtF_VztPPq6Ijk8So0QscdrVYGoaMVvL93z6bbOtXJ1nLuhFmQIfd45GPGuzlktG_OeNQlTZp9nir90DOTpS0pzLtpVhiicuO9D66Tgj-SEZYANsGkahSz-L4yZHaHmBcNu46qZCwdaVz4nTBRSNd_WSDnT4GCuI3WF6swKTiZE4O-mr6YhJgX6_5_huMwUwNFBLNG-8pOwYx8cTsrxY38d0NVS4zs3AovfiDh2w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIAeglqUPNQzkMwzd562qf-otVvbfoUFkSX4y_32iAl_aEHIlIjw6uSGehH2jmDT8HssgVNvg2uCw5-1Hc7KZONV9AVow5C51UfL-7AST84PdKGgcDORMEIfpOD3rulYFuhupdKS1LA8J5KA4ec6E5fjGr6jWENG7RBQJhXJwbP2c95CPeRpDtO-9UfIt895IAIHIs2JJWEnD_ak9ZazbD5PIkO96X-T19G2eIOY1VfotWGilKna54E0vqNf1pydqOMg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=39f4a30505e94c4d947104f3017216a3&_e=gMOZmGVWqVDueIrr_1aIAbGH4XF_AH3sjOvZcZlFHFFFA0uzQAGYNH1lH8n6y7WKDYsnjZInKvxbH0ZGnjIPCMnU8uhFBmFgTq_B-wI_bG2HsOfV6nlJU77UD-0ZxmhCamIPfruZE1Nnng35WQKHGjuL1VJaCY2Z3cGcsPqA_hCiDUzxQhWue0NkS2308XxRUdXC4gkJk1ZOOKGGxs1fWHracuO8jQi9VVmu93BcY_OjZchkcWlry29U2_YNJSNzWhEjwGTlbV-DbSYooKjyt8mjk-9RHslNz--QHt3SdLJhLADA5sc-qgWROOquP-sSIqPGjT3td__-tpmY-CEbvKUHbAVjBg5GK4eBVLKgvpucnS0bM4AZu61tI5ey13l3GumTDo_LNv63r5BAyur3Uw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Friend, I’m sending President Trump’s birthday card soon, and I wanted to make sure you got a chance to sign it. Thanks, Friend! I know he will be so glad to hear from all of us! Leah \------ Forwarded Message Below ------ Friend, It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday in just a few days and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it! I know our President is working hard to make America great again, and it shows! More people have jobs, we all pay less in taxes, and we're finally restoring our place as a leader in this world. Let’s make this birthday the best one yet for our 45th President. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Strongest Ethics Reform Package in U.S. History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ethics_package_release&n=1)
---
Friend -- Richard has released the most comprehensive and sweeping ethics reform package in United States history. He will begin instituting these changes **immediately** upon getting to Washington. Below is the complete text of his proposal:
## **_No Person Above the Law_**
**The Strongest Ethics Reform Package in United States History** The corruption in Washington is staggering. The line between public service and private gain has been all but erased. Donald Trump and members of Congress have repeatedly used public office to personally enrich themselves and their families. Like a cancer, this ethical depravity has spread throughout the rest of the Executive Branch and throughout Congress. _To confront the mounting crisis of improper influence, financial conflict of interest and other ethical violations in Washington, Richard will introduce a bill to do the following:_ 1\. Apply 18 U.S.C § 208, a previously-existing criminal statute that prohibits all unelected federal executive branch officers from participating in any matter with which they or a spouse have a personal financial conflict of interest, to the President, Vice President, and _all_ members of the House and Senate. 2\. Require the President and _all_ members of the House and Senate to **divest** from individual companies’ stocks, bonds and other securities that create conflicts of interests, and instead invest in broadly diversified stock mutual funds, life insurance, bank accounts, and other conflict free assets as defined in already existing Office of Government Ethics regulations. 3\. Expand the post-government-employment ban in 18 U.S.C § 207 to include a **lifetime ban** on former members of the House and Senate serving as paid lobbyists, and provide that violating this ban will result in criminal penalties. 4\. Impose criminal penalties on any U.S. government official who receives profits and benefits from foreign governments in violation of the prohibition in the Emoluments Clause of the Constitution, and mandate that the Department of Justice **investigate and prosecute** persons violating this prohibition. 5\. Impose **term limits** (6 years in the House, 12 years in the Senate) for Congressional leadership positions and committee chairmanships, and dismantle the seniority system that gives more power to long-serving Members. 6\. Strip**pensions** of any official found guilty of violating any federal anti-corruption statute, including but not limited to 18 U.S.C §§ 207 and 208, bribery and gratuity statutes, insider trading laws, and other similar provisions. [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ethics_package_release&n=2) **Can you contribute today and help us bring down the hammer on crimes and corruption in Washington?** Thank you, Painter For Minnesota
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ethics_package_release&n=3)
---
| [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ethics_package_release&n=4) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ethics_package_release&n=5) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Frwpminnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ethics_package_release&n=6)
---

name: Tim Kaine Research Director - Megan Apper
subject: Derek - Who would you endorse in the VA Senate race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
So now that Stewart has been nominated, let's see how he stacks up against Tim Kaine: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

It's our team's job to dig into the facts about Tim - and his new opponent. Every day, we come across things that indicate the kind of Senator Tim is, and the kind of Senator Corey Stewart would be.

**So now that Stewart has been nominated, let's see how he stacks up against Tim Kaine:**

**Tim Kaine, U.S. Senator from Virginia:**
* Called his father-in-law, former Republican Governor Linwood Holton, his political hero for his courage on racial equality.
* As Governor of Virginia, kept unemployment rates under the national average (during the worst recession since the Great Depression) by supporting economic growth -- Virginia was even named the Best State for Business in the country during his tenure!
* Developed a respect for unions, community, hard work, and service at a young age by pitching in at his Dad's small business, a union ironworking shop.
* Took a year off of law school to go on a mission trip to Honduras, cementing his dedication to fight for social justice and equality.
* Will run the kind of campaign in 2018 that's true to who he's always been - a campaign that focuses on building a more progressive Virginia that works for all.

**Corey Stewart, Republican candidate for Senate:**
* Campaigned with Jason Kessler, an organizer of the Charlottesville white supremacist rally that turned deadly.
* As Board of Supervisors Chairman, Corey Stewart has consistently underfunded public schools in Prince William County.
* Steve Bannon called Stewart the "titular head of the Trump movement in Virginia."
* Brags about his harmful attacks on immigrant communities and has troubling ties with anti-Semitic and white supremacist figures.
* Has promised to run a "very vicious and ruthless campaign against Tim Kaine" in 2018.

The facts pretty much speak for themselves, don't you think?

Unfortunately, there's another important fact: Money is going to be poured into this race by right-wing groups. They've already spent hundreds of thousands of dollars in Virginia.

That money will go into attack ads that seek to tarnish Tim's reputation and values.

That's where you come in, Derek. Will you show that Tim has thousands of grassroots supporters who know the kind of person he is and how important his leadership is to Virginia? **You can add your name here:**

[Sign on to become a personal endorser for Tim Kaine's re-election in Virginia now that we're in the general election. Our best chance of defending Tim from the attacks sure to come from Stewart's team is you. Add your name now.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1390/3e0906/6a97298b/3e3404d7/4139915928/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/endorse-tim-kaine?source=20180614_1_PET_MA_Oppo-Research&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+on+to+become+a+personal+endorser+fo&utm_campaign=20180614_1_PET_MA_Oppo-Research") | [**PERSONALLY ENDORSE TIM KAINE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1390/3e0906/6a97298b/3e3404d6/4139915928/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/endorse-tim-kaine?source=20180614_1_PET_MA_Oppo-Research&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+PERSONALLY+ENDORSE+TIM+KAINE&utm_campaign=20180614_1_PET_MA_Oppo-Research")
---
Thanks for reading this long but important email.

_Megan Apper_
Research Director
Kaine 2018

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Endorse-Tim-Kaine](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1390/3e0906/6a97298b/3e3404d5/4139915928/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/endorse-tim-kaine?source=20180614_1_PET_MA_Oppo-Research&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimkainecomEndorseTimKaine&utm_campaign=20180614_1_PET_MA_Oppo-Research")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. name: Ben Jealous
subject: "Those numbers suck."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why Senator Cory Booker is on our team.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba250/3315070464/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?refcode=OHQ0614A") Friend, This afternoon, I'm joining Senator Cory Booker on stage -- but he has been on my team since the very beginning. About a year ago, when I announced I was running for governor, I got a call from him. I didn't have many endorsers yet and he said pretty plainly why he wanted to support me: "We have three black senators. Zero black governors. One former black president. Those numbers suck. We need you to win." [**And I want to win, trust me, but I need your help: Donate $5 or more now to stand with Cory Booker, and let's make history in Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba250/3315070464/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?refcode=OHQ0614A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba253/3315070464/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?amount=5&refcode=OHQ0614A&express_lane=true")
---

---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba25e/3315070464/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?amount=100&refcode=OHQ0614A&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba258/3315070464/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?amount=250&refcode=OHQ0614A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba25a/3315070464/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?refcode=OHQ0614A&express_lane=true")
---
Cory's been pretty open about why this matters so much to him: Simply put, black history is American history. Our nation was founded on perfect ideals, but yet in a savagely imperfect reality -- the very founders of our nation seemed to be strangled by the issue of blacks on our soil.
It's hard right now, there's no getting around that. But we have to think about the future, and the now, and what we must do to carry on, despite obstacles and challenges and frustrations and setbacks. To carry on like our ancestors did, because there's still work to do, there's still injustice to be made just.
Senator Booker believes, and I believe too, that the spirit of our ancestors, the spirit of those who have come before, lives on in us and our hopes and dreams. May we continue on, may we fight the good fight, and may we gift to coming generations an America beyond our greatest dreams. An America that lives up to her promise in a way that we're not experiencing now. We can make that happen.
**That's why we're so committed to making history in Maryland.** [**If you're ready for it, donate $5 or more today, and let's get one step closer to changing the number of black governors from zero to one (of hopefully many!)**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba250/3315070464/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-booker-rally?refcode=OHQ0614A")
Thanks,
Ben

[Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a657/7ab0e2c4/7f99ab7c/349ba24c/3315070464/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Why Senator Cory Booker is on our team. | "" Friend, This afternoon, I'm joining Senator Cory Booker on stage -- but he has been on my team since the very beginning. About a year ago, when I announced I was running for governor, I got a call from him. I didn't have many endorsers yet and he said pretty plainly why he wanted to support me: "We have three black senators. Zero black governors. One former black president. Those numbers suck. We need you to win." "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Cory's been pretty open about why this matters so much to him: Simply put, black history is American history. Our nation was founded on perfect ideals, but yet in a savagely imperfect reality -- the very founders of our nation seemed to be strangled by the issue of blacks on our soil. It's hard right now, there's no getting around that. But we have to think about the future, and the now, and what we must do to carry on, despite obstacles and challenges and frustrations and setbacks. To carry on like our ancestors did, because there's still work to do, there's still injustice to be made just. Senator Booker believes, and I believe too, that the spirit of our ancestors, the spirit of those who have come before, lives on in us and our hopes and dreams. May we continue on, may we fight the good fight, and may we gift to coming generations an America beyond our greatest dreams. An America that lives up to her promise in a way that we're not experiencing now. We can make that happen. That's why we're so committed to making history in Maryland. "" Thanks, Ben "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: why I'm in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
News like this reminds me why it's so important to be in this fight.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633946/1a8421e1/1a45e179a/4b813fa1/1149558168/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friends, This week, we heard the news that the Administration is launching yet another attack on our health care system. The Justice Department wants insurance companies to deny care to people with pre-existing health conditions. **News like this is upsetting, friends** \-- our government should be working to increase access to affordable health care in this country, not take it away from the people who need it most. _**But news like this also reminds me why it 's so important to be in this fight.**_ I go to Congress every day to stand up for Arizona families, and together, this team is fighting to make progress for communities across our district. [**I 'm in a tight race for re-election, and I need you on my team to keep fighting. Would you help me out with a donation before my mid-month fundraising deadline?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.14_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") There's a lot at stake in this election, friends -- just look at the headlines every day. We need to protect our health care system from far-right attacks. We need to stand up to corruption in the Administration and keep our government accountable. Special interests and the far-right are trying to unseat me, but I'll keep up the fight with you on my team. [**Please consider making a donation to my campaign today; I 'd really appreciate your help.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.14_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. ---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

name: Jane Sanders, The Sanders Institute
subject: Please consider a one-year gift
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
The Sanders Institute, launched at The People's Summit last June, has had a strong first year and we have many innovative plans for the future.
#
Friend,
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aae5/bed43eb/68d2a40c/75fd01e9/3288918212/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180614-exp")
_Jane O'Meara Sanders, Sen. Bernie Sanders, RoseAnn DeMoro at the People's Summit in Chicago June 2017_
The Sanders Institute, launched at The People's Summit last June, has had a strong first year and we have many innovative plans for the future. We need your support to shift the framework of debate in a progressive direction and to provide bold, progressive solutions to important issues on an ongoing basis. Please consider making a tax-deductible donation.
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through automatically:_

"https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em180614-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | [Other](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180614-exp&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Since our launch in June of last year, the Institute and our Fellows have focused on issues too often ignored by the mainstream media. A few examples:
* We published countless op-eds, papers, fact sheets, and reports.
* We collaborated with National Nurses United to write a paper on Medicare for All and delivered it to every member of Congress.
* We allied with 200 leading economists to warn about the short-term and long-term implications of the GOP tax plan.
* We began an in-depth interview series, with two innovative approaches - student debt forgiveness and a national jobs guarantee - discussed and backed up with research.
* We released a series of videos about the most glaring issues in our voting system and what individuals and organizations can do about them.
* We are currently working on another series focused on the climate crisis and are in the planning stages for one on criminal justice reform.

name: Team Morse
subject: URGENT: We need 1,000 people to stand up for women’s health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGbZp6B00U_KPvtU76PN_S0i8QvPChQCtGjLpzye00w=/UNg8vB8xwLP3H8aco_6XHPW9QuQZ1w5dV5lJIp_Brx0=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180614_TM_reprosignon_all_logo&recurring=auto)
Team, the assault on our health care access continues. Earlier this week, we filled you in on how McClintock's allies in the administration are going after protections for people with pre-existing conditions--a move which could put 300,000 people in our district at risk of losing care.

**Now, we 're asking you to stand with us against attacks on reproductive health.** Federal Title X funding helps reproductive health care providers like Planned Parenthood assist millions of women and men. Now, under a proposed "gag rule," they're being asked to withhold critical information from patients--or they'll lose funding.

**Join our national petition to reject this rule --before tomorrow night, we need 1,000 people to stand up for reproductive health care. Are you in?**

[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGbZp6B00U_KPvtU76PN_S0i8QvPChQCtGjLpzye00w=/fsSLmIwLElHOnCeMv9YDdFgEyuOrpLuCmFwXn-CDwTo=?code=morseCA04&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjm-titlex%3Fcode%3Dredirect_petition_titlex_20180614)
---

More than 4 million people rely on the services funded by Title X--for everything from cancer screenings to HIV and STD testing. McClintock and his allies want to rip that care away from them.

Help us fight back along with thousands of other allies across the country. [**Add your name now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGbZp6B00U_KPvtU76PN_S0i8QvPChQCtGjLpzye00w=/fsSLmIwLElHOnCeMv9YDdFgEyuOrpLuCmFwXn-CDwTo=?code=morseCA04&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjm-titlex%3Fcode%3Dredirect_petition_titlex_20180614)

name: Tiernan Sittenfeld
subject: We're with Kathy. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Friend, Healthy communities and a healthy environment go hand-in-hand. Healthy communities are essential for growing a strong economy that allows families to thrive. Families living in North Carolina's 13th District deserve to have clean water running from their faucets, clean air to breathe, and a healthy environment in which to raise their children. **The League of Conservation Voters Action Fund is proud to support Kathy Manning for Congress because we know she will fight for sound environmental policies, and a cleaner, healthier future for all.** Our environment impacts each and every person on this planet. Together we must continue to elevate environmental responsibility and clean energy as critical issues in key elections, and elect candidates like Kathy. As a member of the House of Representatives, we are confident Kathy will work to protect our environment, support a clean energy economy and fight for the health and safety of North Carolina families for generations to come. [**_And today, we hope you'll join us by showing your support for Kathy with a contribution._**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427877/e3b7d3/5cba93e8/2555d24b/748252286/VEsH/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180614") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427877/e3b7d3/5cba93e8/2555d24b/748252286/VEsE/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180614")
---
Thank you.
Tiernan Sittenfeld
Senior Vice President, Government Affairs
League of Conservation Voters Action Fund

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

When I took office, I promised to change Harrisburg. And with your support, we've been able to put Pennsylvania on the right path forward.

We've created good-paying jobs, took action to protect seniors, invested in education, and ensured access to affordable healthcare.

And that's because of your support. Your commitment to this campaign will make the difference in the months ahead.

With each passing day, the stakes become more clear, and your support becomes more critical.

**[I will do everything I can to protect our progress and stand up to President Donald Trump and Scott Wagner, but they and their allies will spend tens of millions to beat me.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec20e/73a2bc12/3bf8fbe2/1fcda66d/2513068569/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-june-mmfr?utm_campaign=em18_180614_mmfr_fnd_clq_act_em4_tw&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180614_mmfr_fnd_clq_act_em4_tw&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=8+-+I+will+do+everything+I+can+to+protect+ou")**

They're fighting to roll back all the progress we've made. But I promise you, every chance I get, I'll protect Pennsylvania from their reckless agenda.

I know with thousands of grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me, we can take on Donald Trump and Scott Wagner.

**[So what do you say? Can you chip in just $5 right now?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec20e/73a2bc12/3bf8fbe2/1fcda66c/2513068569/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-june-mmfr?utm_campaign=em18_180614_mmfr_fnd_clq_act_em4_tw&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180614_mmfr_fnd_clq_act_em4_tw&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=9+-+So+what+do+you+say+if+recipientfirstname")**

name: Terrie Rizzo
subject: Trump's birthday card [enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Team,

Today is Donald Trump's birthday, and we want to do something a little something special for him.

**It 's a birthday card signed by THOUSANDS of Democratic activists pledging to fight his extremist agenda all the way till November.**

We're delivering this TONIGHT and **[I want to make sure you have a chance to sign your name with a donation before we hit send.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+I+want+to+make+sure+you+have+a+chance+to&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_1_3&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_1_3&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_1_3")** Dear Donald Trump,

No doubt you're going to use your birthday as another opportunity to brag about how "great" you think you are as president.

**I 'm sick of your empty boasts, and I'm sick of your reckless leadership. That is why I'm taking action to "celebrate" your birthday.**

**[I'm donating to Florida Democrats and adding my name to your birthday card today so you can see how many people are working to defeat your agenda this year!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+donating+to+Florida+Democrats+an&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_1_3&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_1_3&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_1_3") **
[DONATE AND SIGN THE CARD ->](http://act.floridadems. name: Steve Duprey
subject: Looking for a response here
body:
So, Derek,
Jeanie asked me to reach out to you because we had 127 Republicans give [**$25**](%20https://secure.anedot.com/new-hampshire-republican-state-committee/2018-filing-deadline) and **you weren't one of them.** The NHGOP is looking for 73 more Republicans to step up.
I have been the Chairman of the New Hampshire Republican Party so I know how hard it is to be properly funded. There are countless candidates that depend on the Party every election because they either do not have the resources, or they are new candidates and need guidance.
These candidates can't win if the state party can't help them.
[**Please consider giving just $25 RIGHT NOW to ensure we keep our majority.**](%20https://secure.anedot.com/new-hampshire-republican-state-committee/2018-filing-deadline) I don't even want to begin to think what a Democrat legislature would do to our state.
Best,
**Steve Duprey** _RNC National Committeeman _

[ **Click now to give $25** ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSC7OoaiBI5Vexeq2N0YNbu6wa793pAnlPN3Cmg5jRG4Z_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M-2FBTQsogdFHPCVSrhCkEpmvVA-2BIP-2B0TbhuIAwYSXyodrUhCp0lhfpdPz4zgsEieBKkltKH4QrqMg3k3x7XhKOTnmIhf-2BIbnfmYDvExTXAPr78CdjwEMaEKV4258YD3ms0CnKXn5qE9r-2B8AQQj13-2B6zlofBJN7GvGSESR3B89u-2FvX7ex15pzzw9sPdy-2BoPeJ5qJ1Ht9vCWC0CNk6xuy2wFi4kPm8pLiV0mHkf8cIeOfhDkm0JLeG-2BmjIDBFqDiJwU72G1X7Jypos50nQ6iCYl1LA-3D-3D)

name: Team Ryan
subject: This should be a no-brainer, Betsy DeVos!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos told a House committee that her new school safety commission will NOT study the one common denominator in all school shootings: guns. | |
---
Folks, **Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos told a House committee that her new school safety commission will NOT study the one common denominator in all school shootings: guns.** This should be a no-brainer. There have been 20 school shootings in 2018 alone. But Betsy DeVos and this Administration are failing to take this threat seriously. [Join me in demanding that the school safety commission examine common sense gun reform:](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6b/1521046974/VEsH/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-ryan") [SIGN ON >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6b/1521046974/VEsE/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-ryan") Since Columbine, 215,000 American students have been affected by school shootings. **American students today no longer wonder _if_ there will be a shooting at their school -- they worry about what they'll do _when_ it happens. We can't be okay with that.** Yet, Secretary DeVos and the Administration are sitting idly by. Why? The National Rifle Association (NRA) which opposes ALL gun reform, spent $70 million to elect Trump and other Republicans, according to a report by McClatchy. **DeVos and Trump owe their current positions to the gun lobby. But if****the public****outcry is strong enough, they 'll be forced to act. **[We're joining with Democrats across the country to demand that DeVos and her school safety commission take gun violence seriously -- join us now:](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6b/1521046974/VEsF/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-ryan") [SIGN ON >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6b/1521046974/VEsC/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/tell-devos-take-school-shootings-seriously-ryan") If the commission fails to address gun violence in our schools, it is a sham. We must speak out. Thank you, \-- Team Ryan [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6a/1521046974/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_june18?refcode=devosja_footer_30")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6d/1521046974/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6c/1521046974/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6f/1521046974/VEsO/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6e/1521046974/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6d/1521046974/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92fe/5486deaa/287eb5f4/dcc7a6c/1521046974/VEsHBw/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Molly K.
subject: need you (before midnight)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Friends - quick note here: I'm coming up on a huge filing deadline, but I just heard from my team that we still need to raise another $3,600 by tomorrow to hit our goal.
Luckily, a group of generous donors has offered to match every gift, dollar for dollar, until tomorrow's deadline - because if we're going to win in New Hampshire, we simply cannot come up short.
**I'm running to put families like yours first, so - unlike Chris Sununu - I'm not taking any money from corporations. That's why this match opportunity is so crucial for us if we want to take back the corner office.**
**Please, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important:**[Will you give $5 or more right now- whatever you can spare - and have every dollar DOUBLED to win in New Hampshire and build a state that works for everyone, not just the special interests?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485f/d0ce7de/5141de7e/9cd2da6/2955253854/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk57-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thanks for being by our side. Molly
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Supporters of Molly Kelly email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc485f/d0ce7de/5141de7e/9cd2da5/2955253854/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent

| | | **Peter,**
Mr. Keeley, in his years of experience and decorated service to our country, knows the grave dangers that an unhinged Deep State in Washington poses to our National Security and believes that _Courtland Sykes understands these perils best of all the candidates running in this vital race for the U.S. Senate._

Mr. Keeley asks that you stand with him and support true fighters this _**August 7th,**_ to take the fight to the Deep State, to stand with Courtland Sykes to #FIREClaire and support President Trump.

name: Gabe Amo
subject: FWD: March in the Pride Parade with Gina!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hey friend,
I just wanted to make sure you saw David's message, and remind you that the Pride Parade is this Saturday! If you want to march with the Governor, **meet us at the corner of Clifford and Dorrance at 7pm, June 16th -- we 're Group 18!**
Looking forward to marching at your side, with PRIDE! **[Click here to RSVP now.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0cc/5e076a9e/54241380/14426087/653354743/VEsH/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/march-with-gina-at-the-pride-parade")**
Gabe
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: David Ortiz (info@ginaraimondo.com)
Date: Tue, Jun 12, 2018 at 3:55 PM
Subject: March in the Pride Parade with Gina!
Hi friend,
I wanted to invite you to march in the Pride Parade on Saturday with Governor Gina Raimondo. **[Click here to RSVP now!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0cc/5e076a9e/54241380/14426087/653354743/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/march-with-gina-at-the-pride-parade")**
Now more than ever, it's critical that we stand in solidarity and support of Rhode Island's LGBTQ+ community. **Meet us at the corner of Clifford and Dorrance at 7pm on 6/16 -- we 're Group 18.** I look forward to marching with you then!
Thank you,
David
David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940
###### This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
###### If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, visit [https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0cc/5e076a9e/54241380/14426086/653354743/VEsF/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe").

name: Kimberly Padilla
subject: if this wasn't bad enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I know, Peter -- we send you a lot of messages. If we were operating in a campaign finance system that wasn't rigged in favor of Super PACs and Donald Trump wasn't raising $50,000 with the click of a button for Sherrod's opponent, we wouldn't have to. **But that 's not the world we're living in.** This is: A new poll shows Sherrod and his opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, separated by single digits. And Renacci just went up with his first major TV ad buy of the election -- it's a statewide attack ad and it's nasty. If that wasn't bad enough, we're behind on tomorrow night's goal. We need to raise $27,739 by tomorrow at midnight if we're going to hit our $300,000 mid-month goal. [**_Will you rush in $5, $10, or match our average online gift of $26 so we can hit our goal Peter?_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff92b/4462dc26/51ec8143/2007c709/1243658118/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjE0cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYiJ9/ clean_body: | | | I know, Peter -- we send you a lot of messages. If we were operating in a campaign finance system that wasn't rigged in favor of Super PACs and Donald Trump wasn't raising $50,000 with the click of a button for Sherrod's opponent, we wouldn't have to. But that 's not the world we're living in. This is: A new poll shows Sherrod and his opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, separated by single digits. And Renacci just went up with his first major TV ad buy of the election -- it's a statewide attack ad and it's nasty. If that wasn't bad enough, we're behind on tomorrow night's goal. We need to raise $27,739 by tomorrow at midnight if we're going to hit our $300,000 mid-month goal. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" If we miss tomorrow night's goal, we won't be on track to hit the first FEC end-of-quarter goal of the general election. Our numbers will go public and Renacci will know exactly how competitive, or vulnerable, we are. With Renacci going statewide with his attacks against Sherrod and the polls tightening, we need to kick our efforts into high gear and fight back. "" | | | "" I'm grateful for your help, Kimberly Kimberly Padilla Finance Director Friends of Sherrod Brown | "" "" | | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

name: Emily
subject: I'll keep this short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm going to keep this short, team. Last month, we fell _VERY_ short of our goal.
We're doing a full audit of what happened now, but one thing's clear: That CANNOT happen again. We're trailing GOP extremist Dean Heller by one point in a recent poll, and everyone's saying Nevada is the race that could decide Senate control. **So if we don 't make up this shortfall ASAP, we'll be handing the election - and the Senate majority - to the GOP.**
I don't want to have to tell Jacky that we fell short of our goal again this month - but right now we're dropping the ball and need to turn things around fast. I'm counting on you to come through now. **[Please, be one of the 2,500 people we need to give $5 now and become a Senate Victory Member to help us win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd786/4fbb2af3/7017553a/5e8a5e1d/1257238118/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcxNS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk715-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,
Emily
Finance Director

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd786/4fbb2af3/7017553a/5e8a5e18/1257238118/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd786/4fbb2af3/7017553a/5e8a5e19/1257238118/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd786/4fbb2af3/7017553a/5e8a5e67/1257238118/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

name: staff@floridadems.org
subject: Terrie is ready to hit send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Bumping Terrie's email for you. This birthday card will be a huge wake-up call for Trump. He might think he and Rick Scott have Florida in the bag, but they're in for a big surprise.

**[She's hitting send soon. Click here to donate and sign your name to Trump's birthday card so he gets a cold reminder we're working every day to defeat his agenda in 2018 -- this is the last call!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Shersquos+hitting+send+soon+Click+here+t&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4")**

_Begin forwarded message from Terrie Rizzo:_

Team,

Today is Donald Trump's birthday, and we want to do something a little something special for him.

**It 's a birthday card signed by THOUSANDS of Democratic activists pledging to fight his extremist agenda all the way till November.**

We're delivering this TONIGHT and **[I want to make sure you have a chance to sign your name with a donation before we hit send.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+I+want+to+make+sure+you+have+a+chance+to&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4")** Dear Donald Trump,

No doubt you're going to use your birthday as another opportunity to brag about how "great" you think you are as president.

**I 'm sick of your empty boasts, and I'm sick of your reckless leadership. That is why I'm taking action to "celebrate" your birthday.**

**[I'm donating to Florida Democrats and adding my name to your birthday card today so you can see how many people are working to defeat your agenda this year!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Irsquom+donating+to+Florida+Democrats+an&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4") **
[DONATE AND SIGN THE CARD ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+AND+SIGN+THE+CARD+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4") Since you took office, you've taken our country backwards.

You passed unconstitutional travel bans, denied the threat of climate change, and cozied up to dictators like Kim Jong Un.

**It might be your birthday Thursday, but I am fighting every day to challenge you and stop your agenda this November!**

**[I'm proud to support Democrats in critical states like Florida, which are on the front lines of the fight to flip Congress and the Senate blue this year.](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Irsquom+proud+to+support+Democrats+in+cr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4") **
[DONATE AND SIGN THE CARD ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+AND+SIGN+THE+CARD+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4") Sincerely,

[Your Name Here] While Trump is undoubtedly bragging about all of his "success" this year, we're continuing our work to turn Florida blue and stop his extremist agenda.

That's why we need as many supporters as possible to contribute and add their name to the card before the end of the day.

**[Donate now and add your name to Trump's card so he knows he won't be celebrating in November!](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-trump-birthday-2018?amount=5&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+Donate+now+and+add+your+name+to+Trumps+c&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&source=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_30DO_180614_2_4")**

Thanks,
Terrie

---

name: KAINE VA HQ
subject: We're keeping a secret from America's Dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e341999/1710398048/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

**Tim Kaine rose to national fame as "America's Dad" \- and let us tell you - we think he lives up to it every day!**

Tim Kaine loves being a dad, his three "cool, adult children" are his proudest achievement and one of his role models is his wife Anne's dad, Governor Linwood Holton.

And Tim has also enjoyed getting to be a father-like figure to people around the country. **He even learned what "dad jokes" are _(he thought they were just called "jokes")_.**

Here at HQ, we're getting ready to celebrate Father's Day and we plan to have some surprises up our sleeve for our boss, and for all of you, too!

[Click here to watch a quick video we whipped up and to sign our card wishing Tim Kaine a happy Father's Day ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e341998/1710398048/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Fathers-Day-Card?source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+watch+a+quick+video+we+whi&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e34199f/1710398048/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Fathers-Day-Card?source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ") Father's Day is different for everyone - sometimes it's time for family, sometimes it's just another [Sunday.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e34199e/1710398048/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Fathers-Day-Card?source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Sunday&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ") But we hope you spend the upcoming week and this weekend enjoying yourself, and celebrating the wholesome jokes and silly advice that comes from having someone you can look up to and count on, whoever that is to you.

We promise to keep the "dad jokes" coming (maybe a couple of fatherly pointers and cautionary warnings, too) if you promise to celebrate with us!

[Watch as Team Kaine and members of our community reminisce and wish Tim Kaine a Happy Father's Day, and sign our card while you're at it ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e34199d/1710398048/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Fathers-Day-Card?source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Watch+as+Team+Kaine+and+members+of+our+c&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ") | [**SIGN TIM 'S CARD**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e34199c/1710398048/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Fathers-Day-Card?source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+TIMrsquoS+CARD&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ")
---

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Fathers-Day-Card](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1391/3e0906/6afa1f7a/3e341993/1710398048/VEsB/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Fathers-Day-Card?source=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFathersDayCard&utm_campaign=20180614_2_CARD_TEAM_Birthday-HQ")

|

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | "" | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, Tim Kaine rose to national fame as "America's Dad" \- and let us tell you - we think he lives up to it every day! Tim Kaine loves being a dad, his three "cool, adult children" are his proudest achievement and one of his role models is his wife Anne's dad, Governor Linwood Holton. And Tim has also enjoyed getting to be a father-like figure to people around the country. He even learned what "dad jokes" are (he thought they were just called "jokes"). Here at HQ, we're getting ready to celebrate Father's Day and we plan to have some surprises up our sleeve for our boss, and for all of you, too! "" "" Father's Day is different for everyone - sometimes it's time for family, sometimes it's just another "" But we hope you spend the upcoming week and this weekend enjoying yourself, and celebrating the wholesome jokes and silly advice that comes from having someone you can look up to and count on, whoever that is to you. We promise to keep the "dad jokes" coming (maybe a couple of fatherly pointers and cautionary warnings, too) if you promise to celebrate with us! "" | "" "" | "" "" ""

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Stacey Abrams supports my vision
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3f/767134fb/5f52f903/4338310c/969797805/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi , I am happy to announce that [Stacey Abrams has endorsed my campaign for Prince George's County Executive.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3f/767134fb/5f52f903/4338310d/969797805/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oSA0bhgC324&feature=youtu.be") I am thrilled to know that we have the support of my friend Stacey, a trailblazer who is poised to lead the state of Georgia. She believes in my vision for this county and our nation. Stacey knows that I am the best person to lead Prince George's County because of my commitment to fighting for the most vulnerable members of our community. To win this election, I rely on grassroots support instead of big real estate developers funding my opponent. **[Will you show your support by donating $10 or whatever you can today?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3f/767134fb/5f52f903/4338310a/969797805/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Now more than ever, we need leaders who will stand up against Trump's dangerous policy agenda and fight to improve access to health care, build community schools, and spur innovation in our economy. Both Stacey and I share this commitment, and if you are in solidarity with us, **[I hope you will support my campaign for Prince George's County Executive by donating $10 or whatever you can today.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff3f/767134fb/5f52f903/4338310a/969797805/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Thank you for continued support. Together, we can build a better future for every state and county. Donna Edwards
---
|
